falsification_conditions.condition: The price closes above the 200-day moving average by at least 5% within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This would indicate a strong bullish trend contradicting the HOLD signal and suggesting the pattern is not a bottom but a continuation

falsification_conditions.condition: Trading volume surges to 150% above the 30-day average volume on a single day
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Such a spike would signal extreme market participation, invalidating the HOLD by showing a clear breakout or blowoff move

falsification_conditions.condition: The blowoff score increases to 70 or higher within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This would directly contradict the current blowoff score of 40, proving the system's assessment is incorrect and indicating a different market phase

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
